title: cyclosorus lineatus
intro: Cyclosorus lineatus, also known as the narrow sword fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. It is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. Cyclosorus lineatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly used in folk medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
